summary: All 3 cost_query tests passed. VAL-API-005 assertion confirmed: CostQuery command properly parses task_id and None cases, and CostQueryResult event serialization works correctly. Per-model cost breakdown and token counts are properly serialized.
frictions: Note: The assertion specified 'cargo test -p swell-orchestrator -- cost_query' but the tests actually reside in swell-daemon (test_parse_cost_query_with_task_id, test_parse_cost_query_no_task_id, test_cost_query_result_event_serialization)

testsValidating.validates: CostQuery with no task_id (aggregate) parses correctly
